_comment: Synthetic AirNow per-ZCTA forecast. Used when AIRNOW_API_KEY is unset OR when AirNow returns nothing for a given ZCTA. Hero ZCTAs (10454, 10474) are missing here intentionally so the diurnal fallback runs and we can hand-tune via forecast_overrides.json.
_format: Each ZIP key maps to 24 hourly AQI values starting at hour 0 (midnight local). Pipeline rotates these to align with generated_at hour.
